basic_details.job_title: SAES Korba Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 79 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Swami Atmanand English Medium Schools Korba (SAES Korba)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates with qualifications such as Post Graduation, Graduation, B.Ed., D.El.Ed./D.Ed., CG TET (Primary/Upper Primary), Computer Diploma, and English Medium educational background as per post requirements are eligible to apply for these latest teaching jobs in Chhattisgarh within the prescribed age limit of 21 to 35 years, with additional relaxation available for SC/ST/OBC, women, Chhattisgarh residents, and PWD candidates as per government rules.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC (Non-creamy layer): +5 years; Women (all categories): +10 years; Chhattisgarh residents (all categories): +5 years (max 40 years); PWD: as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation (II Division), Graduation (45% or II Division), B.Ed., D.El.Ed./D.Ed., CG TET (Primary/Upper Primary), English Medium Education (for most posts)
qualification.details: Lecturer: Post Graduate degree in relevant subject (minimum II division) + B.Ed. Teacher (English), Teacher (Art), Teacher (Manual), Teacher (Drawing), Drawing Teacher: Graduation (min 45%) + B.Ed. + CG TET (Upper Primary) + Entire education in English medium. Computer Teacher: Graduation in Computer Science/IT/Computer Application (II division). English medium preferred. Headmaster: Graduation (II division) + B.Ed. in English medium or HSC + D.Ed. in English medium. Librarian: Graduation (II division) + B.Lib. English medium preferred. Assistant Teacher: 12th (min 45%) + D.El.Ed./D.Ed. + CG TET (Primary) + Entire education in English medium. Lab Assistant (Science): 12th with Biology/Maths + Entire education in English medium. Assistant Grade-02: 12th (II division) + 1-year Computer Diploma + Typing speed.

selection_process: Provisional Merit List (Academic Percentage Weightage) Document Verification Final Merit List / Selection List
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SAES Korba Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SAES Korba to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SAES Korba Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the SAES Korba Teaching and Non-Teaching posts is 25 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 79 vacancies for Teaching and Non-Teaching posts released by Swami Atmanand English Medium Schools Korba.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for SAES Korba Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the preparation of a Provisional Merit List based on academic percentage, followed by Document Verification, and finally the Final Merit List/Selection List.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Teacher posts?
faq.answer: For Assistant Teacher posts, candidates need to have completed 12th grade (minimum 45%), D.El.Ed./D.Ed., and CG TET (Primary), with their entire education in English medium.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 19,500/- to Rs. 38,100/- per month, depending on the post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q8. Are the posts on a contract basis?
faq.answer: Yes, the job type for these positions is contract-based.

faq.question: Q9. Which mode of application is accepted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
